title: geraniospermum meyeri
intro: Geraniospermum meyeri, a type of flowering plant in the family Menispermaceae, is also known as the May apple or Japanese mayapple. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Geraniospermum meyeri include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage. The plant is typically prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, with some also using it in traditional folk medicine in East Asia.
